title: HON-46 global request quotas

approval.required: production deploy or production quota enablement only
approval.granted: local implementation and PR covered by user instruction
approval.notes: Do not enable HONOWARDEN_GLOBAL_REQUEST_QUOTA in production for this issue.

checks.command: pnpm exec vitest run test/domain/request-quota.test.ts test/repositories/request-quota-repository.test.ts test/app.test.ts test/ops/abuse-report-cli.test.ts test/migrations.test.ts test/security-docs.test.ts test/scheduled.test.ts test/release-docs.test.ts test/wrangler-environments.test.ts test/infra/db-health.test.ts --testNamePattern "request quota|global request quota|abuse report|adds request quota|critical security|scheduled auth cleanup|request quota cleanup|migration|release notes|environment|database health"

boundaries: No external dashboard or alert routing.
